THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO BENJAMIN HAGERL. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $5,000.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY CAROLYN HAGIN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT BENJAMIN HAGERL. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,235.87 U.S. CURRENCY; $23,736.00 U.S. CURRENCY PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY:$2,235.87 U.S. CURRENCY; $28,736.00 U.S. CURRENCY HELD UNDER SFPD NUMBER 130-663-087 AND SEIZED UNDER SEARCH WARRANT IN THIS CASE, BE RELEASED TO THE SFPD FOR THE PURPOSES OF DISTRIBUTING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO 11489 H&S. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Motion For Final Judgment As To Interested Party Steven Terrell Only
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Amy Shearer, Asst. District Attorney, Tel. No. 1-415-553-9706 appearing
for the Petitioner;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion for final judgment as to interested party Steven Terrell only is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
